title: matterbridge-ecovacs-yeedi
description: Matterbridge plugin to bridge Ecovacs/Yeedi robot vacuums into Matter (Home Assistant, Apple Home, Google Home, Alexa)

email.title: Account Email
email.description: Your Yeedi or Ecovacs account email address

password.title: Account Password
password.description: Your Yeedi or Ecovacs account password

countryCode.title: Country Code
countryCode.description: Two-letter country code for your account (e.g. US, DE, IT, UK)

authDomain.title: Auth Domain
authDomain.description: Use 'yeedi.com' for Yeedi robots. Leave empty for Ecovacs/Deebot.

pollingInterval.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollingInterval.description: How often to poll the robot for status updates. Recommended: 15–60.

whiteList.title: Device Whitelist
whiteList.description: List of device nicknames or IDs to include. Leave empty to include all devices.

rooms.title: Room Configuration
rooms.description: Customize which rooms are exposed and their display names. Leave empty to auto-discover.

id.title: Room ID
id.description: The Ecovacs/Yeedi internal room ID (visible in logs as 'Room loaded: ID = name')

name.title: Custom Name
name.description: Custom display name. Leave empty to use the name from the app.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether this room is exposed to Matter controllers
